rationale.root_cause: They pinpointed the FLAW at free(data) on line ~34 followed by printLine(data) on line ~36 and explained that printf("%s") reads from a dangling pointer. They also noted why the NULL check in printLine doesn’t help.
rationale.local_fix: They moved free(data) to occur after printLine(data), eliminating the use-after-free. They provided a concrete diff reflecting this change.
rationale.global_fix: They suggested an explicit ownership/lifetime discipline with a single cleanup point (e.g., cleanup label) and an owned-buffer abstraction with clear borrowing/ownership semantics. This makes object lifetime explicit, satisfying the global-fix criterion.
